# Repository Settings Suggestions

This file records recommended GitHub repository settings. It does not change the repository automatically.

## Repository Description

Recommended short description:

```text
Codex Skills for building a long-term investor decision system.
```

Why this works:

- It describes the whole repository, not only one skill.
- It names the core job: building a long-term investor decision system.
- It is broad enough for future investment-system skills.
- It is specific enough for GitHub search, profile pages, and shared links.

## Skill-Level Description

Use the README and each skill folder to describe individual skills.

Recommended one-line descriptions for the investment skills:

```text
investor-company-xray: Review whether a company deserves long-term investor attention.
investor-trade-check: Check thesis, emotion, valuation, margin of safety, and sizing before trading.
investor-position-review: Review whether the original thesis for an existing holding still holds.
```

## Suggested Topics

```text
codex
codex-skill
ai-workflow
investment
investor-tools
decision-support
behavioral-finance
value-investing
investment-system
long-term-investing
portfolio-review
automation
```

## Social Preview

Suggested file:

```text
.github/assets/social-preview.png
```

If GitHub does not accept the generated PNG, use the SVG source at:

```text
.github/assets/social-preview.svg
```

and export it manually as a PNG with size `1280x640`.

## About Section

Keep the About section broad:

- Website: optional
- Description: use the repository-level description above
- Topics: use the list above

Keep the repository description focused on investment-system skills.
